name: Number 76: Harmonizer Gradielle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>７６ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>諧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>調</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グラディエール
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
This card's Attribute is also treated as each of its attached materials' Attributes. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster of the same Attribute, also cannot be destroyed by the activated effects of your opponent's monsters with the same Attribute. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; detach 1 material from this card, and if you do, attach that target to this card as material. You can only use this effect of "Number 76: Harmonizer Gradielle" once per turn.

action: Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
